layoutRegions.name: topbar
layoutRegions.purpose: App identity, active workspace, and one primary action.

layoutRegions.name: inspector
layoutRegions.purpose: Contextual details for the selected command or object.

components.name: CommandRow
components.purpose: A stable-height action row with shortcut, label, status, and focus ring.

components.name: StatusPill
components.purpose: Compact semantic status label for ready, warning, error, or info states.

components.name: Keycap
interactions: wraps long chords without resizing row height

acceptanceChecks: Generated app imports src/omarchy-theme.css before app styles.
Every visible color comes from a --omarchy-* CSS variable or color-mix using one.
Every button, row, input, and command item has a visible :focus-visible state.
Layout remains stable at 320px, 768px, and 1280px viewport widths.
Primary content is usable on first load without a marketing interstitial.
A .desktop launcher can be generated with omarchy-native app desktop.
An opt-in theme sync hook can be generated with omarchy-native app hook.
